query_text: long term investment process fundamental research institutional
notes: Capital Group and T. Rowe Price style sources support long horizon and fundamental research but provide limited executable detail.

query_text: Capital Group investment philosophy long term fundamental research
notes: Useful for research culture and long-horizon discipline, not enough for variable-level workflow.

query_text: T. Rowe Price proprietary fundamental research long term investment approach
notes: Useful to justify proprietary fundamental research and analyst specialization, but public detail is broad.

query_text: CFA Institute industry competitive analysis Porter PESTLE industry life cycle
notes: Strong public baseline for industry definition, industry size, growth, profitability, concentration, Porter forces and PESTLE.

query_text: Harvard Business School Porter Five Forces official framework
notes: Good competitive structure lens; must be paired with company execution and valuation expectations.

query_text: BCG growth share matrix experience curve portfolio management
notes: Useful for portfolio position and market-share/cash-generation thinking; too coarse for standalone equity thesis.

query_text: McKinsey consumer decision journey initial consideration active evaluation loyalty loop
notes: Useful for demand formation, channel touchpoints, loyalty and post-purchase loops.

query_text: consumer funnel failure loyalty loop switching behavior brand decay
notes: Consumer journey frameworks can overweight marketing funnel and underweight affordability, substitution and macro pressure.

query_text: HBR jobs to be done Christensen customer product innovation
notes: Useful for separating real customer progress from feature or TAM storytelling.

query_text: SVPG product discovery value usability feasibility viability risks
notes: Useful for product risk decomposition before accepting product-led thesis.

query_text: Sequoia product market fit customer love retention usage
notes: Useful for startup and growth company product validation; less directly applicable to mature cyclicals.

query_text: IMF World Economic Outlook growth inflation policy long term macro framework
notes: Useful macro regime and global growth/inflation context, but must translate to company variables.

query_text: World Bank Global Economic Prospects long term growth productivity investment
notes: Useful for productivity, investment and growth backdrop; public equity thesis still needs asset transmission chain.

query_text: credit cycle interest rates inflation liquidity equity valuation transmission chain
notes: Macro lens should not replace company analysis unless macro is the dominant price setter.

query_text: Morgan Stanley Mauboussin return on invested capital competitive advantage period capital allocation
notes: Strong bridge from business quality to value creation: ROIC, reinvestment runway, competitive advantage period and capital allocation.

query_text: Expectations Investing Rappaport Mauboussin market implied expectations
notes: Critical addition: reverse-engineer price-implied expectations before declaring a long-term thesis attractive.

query_text: why long term investment theses fail product market fit valuation competition macro
notes: Common failures are lens mismatch, TAM-to-company leap, ignoring valuation, and extrapolating short-term evidence.

notes: Official Hillhouse sources improve Asian practitioner coverage but remain high-level philosophy.
